pageContext.name: Space Wolves Venerable Dreadnought Brother Hvor
pageContext.description: Space Wolves, or Vlka Fenryka ('Wolves of Fenris'), were one of the founding chapters of the Space Marine organization. They were distinguished from their counterparts for their extremely anti-authoritarian ways, choosing instead to embrace a savage barbarian culture. They deviate from what it means to be a space marine about as far as possible, savage, proud, and seeking glory in all that they do.  Venerable Dreadnoughts are distinct even among the already powerful walking powerhouses known as dreadnoughts, for venerable dreadnoughts are considered veteran warriors. The oldest and wisest among them have participated in thousands of battles, with some living millennia in their pursuit of battle and victory.  Sideshow and JoyToy are proud to offer the Space Wolves Venerable Dreadnought Brother Hvor Collectible Figure. Add it to your Warhammer 40K collection today!
